speaker: MATT
raw_text: That being the case, anyone who cares to get involved in this, I need you to roll initiative.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: (pained grunt)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: -- and find a large portion of your vitality and breath and just general awareness knocked out of you from from one singular blow from nowhere. Your eyes go white for a second--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: This is the sound that I make. (high pitched goat-like yelps) (all laugh)

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: That's a wuss panic.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Do I get a shot?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That was the surprise round, because you were not aware of this circumstance. We're going to continue combat after this break. (cheers and laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'm getting in on this!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It was his idea!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Oh yeah. Just so you're aware, everyone who's watching, you just watched your boyfriend cold-cock an innocent person.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I watched him walk up behind him and do it. I knew what he was doing.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, just so you're aware. All right guys--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: This is a part of our Vox Machina hazing. This is what we do!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: This is pretty fucked up, you guys. (all laugh)

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: So fucked up!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, we'll come back in a few minutes after we take a quick break to continue this combat. We'll see you here shortly. [BREAK]

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Hello everyone and welcome back to Critical Role. So, last we left off, in the middle of the Whitestone courtyard, two members of Vox Machina decided, as part of the hazing process, to assault our new temporary party member.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: (laughs) When you put it like that.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: How about test?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: This is literally the third time we have done this.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I know! I'm not surprised by any of you. It's just-- Oh no, I am surprised, I wasn't expecting it, but it makes sense.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Wow, it sounds like us last week.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, exactly.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Hey!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Or every week.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Yeah, so Vex is the only one who's not there. Okay, so, for those who are present and wish to be part of this: roll initiative. What have we got? So we have...

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: So fucked up!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, we'll come back in a few minutes after we take a quick break to continue this combat. We'll see you here shortly. [BREAK]

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Hey!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That being the case, anyone who cares to get involved in this, I need you to roll initiative.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: In.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: In.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Am I there?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Wait, you guys are all doing this to me?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: No, I want to be in initiative just to make sure that I can actually make sure that--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I want to make decisions.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Would you have gone with him, or would you have stayed back?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Well, I was coming from talking to Jarrett so, it's up to you if I'm there yet.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So yeah, you wouldn't be there actually, yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Am I walking up as it's happening?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You will be walking up towards the castle.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: This was a--

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, this was a Tweedledee and Tweedledum.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: -- Grog whispering to Vax thing, on a walk.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So. There is no Percival, no Keyleth in, but you guys were--

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Oh, I'm in!

preceding_turns.text: No, I'm in.

preceding_turns.text: Okay. Percival's in, yeah, they're there.
